revision.comment: Adding {{pp-template}}
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Markup/styles.css]]
Adding {{pp-template}}
Adding {{pp-template}}
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:11:07 on [[Template:Markup/styles.css]]
change class name
Make it more generic
add
the actual HTML tag is "code", not "syntaxhighlight"
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 7 revisions imported
Protected "[[Template:Markup/styles.css]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
